innerDirection: Your heart already senses more than your doubt allows you to admit.
reflection:
Something in you already knows this is not a one-way flame. What you carry toward them does not dissolve into empty air — it is being felt, even where it has not yet found a voice. The hesitation you keep reading in them is not absence; it is two people circling the same warmth, each waiting for the other to move first.

Venus drifting across your Moon right now is softening the space between you, and that is why the wondering has grown so loud in you lately. The ache of not knowing is itself a sign of how close this sits to your heart. What burns in you is an ember, not a fantasy — quiet, steady, and waiting for air.

currents.label: Quiet Mirroring
currents.text: The glances and pauses you keep noticing are echoes of a feeling moving in both directions.

currents.label: Fear Of Exposure
currents.text: Part of you dreads being seen wanting, and that dread muffles what your instincts already read.

currents.label: Held Breath
currents.text: This connection sits in a suspended moment, warm but unclaimed, waiting for one honest breath.

whisper: What is quietly returned rarely announces itself first.
suggestions: Should I confess my feelings to them?
Why am I so afraid of rejection?
What energy do I give off around them?
Is this connection worth pursuing right now?
